title: Moderation Update - Abuse Queue Cleared
body:
Queue triage complete (6 reports):

SANCTIONS APPLIED:
• Banned: spam_wave_42 (phishing links, zero tolerance)
• Warned: toxic_runner (targeted harassment)
• Warned: bot_like_user_77 (suspicious automation)

TRUSTED MEMBERS PROTECTED:
• core_maintainer: False positive from brigading — no action
• trusted_helper: Dispute — resolved without sanction

LOW PRIORITY:
• new_member_17: Formatting issue — education note sent

Queue status: CLEAR. All reports processed.
